cases.description: Standard business follow-up should produce a complete email with subject, greeting, body, sign-off
cases.output:
Subject: Follow-up on Integration Discussion and Proposal Scope

Dear Anjali,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to follow up on our discussion last Tuesday regarding the integration with Stripe. As we approach the deadline for the proposal, I wanted to confirm the scope of the project with you.

Specifically, I would like to clarify whether your team would like us to handle webhook retry logic on our side or if you would prefer to manage it on your end. This detail will be crucial in drafting an accurate proposal.

Please let me know your thoughts on this matter, and I will proceed with writing up the proposal accordingly. I appreciate your time, and I look forward to hearing back from you soon.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

cases.description: Physics concept should be explained without jargon dump
cases.output: Imagine you have two toy cars that are connected in a special way. If you make one car spin around, the other car will spin around too, even if it's on the other side of the room. Now, imagine this connection is so strong that it works even if the cars are on opposite sides of the world. If you make one car spin, the other car will start spinning instantly, no matter how far apart they are. This is kind of like what happens with quantum entanglement, but instead of toy cars, it's tiny particles that are connected in this special way.

cases.description: Standard project meeting should yield action items with owners where mentioned
cases.output:

[ ] Approve the dark mode palette — Anjali

[ ] Attend next sync on Thursday 3pm

cases.description: Planning meeting with clear decisions should produce both sections with content
cases.output:
## Decisions Made
* Ship the new auth flow before the dashboard refresh
* Revisit the timeline if engineering hits the two-week mark without a beta
* Compensation budget is approved for hiring a second platform engineer

## Open Questions
* Whether to sunset the legacy API by the end of the year or extend support another quarter
* Whether to hire a second platform engineer this quarter or wait for Q4
* Gathering data from the support team on legacy usage by Friday to inform the decision on the legacy API

cases.description: Project launch post should have hook, value, and CTA — under 300 words, max 3 hashtags
cases.output:
The frustration of watching your single-provider LLM apps break during demos is all too real. 
I've been there, and it's a hard lesson to learn - especially when you're trying to showcase the power of AI to stakeholders.

That's why I'm excited to announce that we've just shipped Cortex, an open-source multi-provider LLM orchestration platform. 
This game-changing platform routes requests across multiple providers, including Groq, Cerebras, Gemini, and OpenRouter, with automatic fallback on rate limits.

After six months of pouring my heart and soul into this project, I'm thrilled to make it available to the community - for free. 
No more broken demos, no more frustrated stakeholders. Just seamless, reliable access to the power of LLMs.

What are you most excited to build with Cortex? 
#LLM #AI #OpenSource

cases.description: Career advice should be converted into a numbered thread starting with 1/
cases.output:
1/ Just spent 2 years applying to jobs and made EVERY mistake. But I learned a thing or two. Want to know the secrets to getting hired?

2/ Stop over-optimizing your resume! 1 hour is enough. Move on to what really matters.

3/ Ditch the written project descriptions! Create a Loom demo to showcase your work instead.

4/ Networking tip: ditch LinkedIn and contribute to open source projects. It's a game changer.

5/ Don't be afraid to follow up after rejection. It actually works!

6/ Quality over quantity: apply to fewer jobs, but customize each one heavily. It's worth the effort.

7/ The secret to getting hired? Building a project you're passionate about. The one you'd build anyway.

8/ Ready to land your dream job? Remember, it's not just about the application. It's about the work you put in and the value you bring.

cases.description: Stiff corporate message should become warm and conversational
cases.output: I wanted to follow up on our previous conversation about the project timeline. We've made some adjustments, and I'm excited to share the updated schedule with you. We're now aiming to wrap everything up by November 30th. If you have any questions or concerns about this new deadline, please don't hesitate to reach out to me - I'm here to help and want to make sure you're comfortable with the revised plan.

cases.description: Casual email should become formal — contractions removed, structure improved, meaning preserved
cases.output: I am writing to inform you that it will be necessary to extend the deadline by one week. The team is currently overwhelmed with the other release, and it has become clear that the original deadline of this Friday is no longer feasible. If this revised timeline poses any issues, I would appreciate the opportunity to discuss alternative solutions with you via a call. Please let me know if this is acceptable, and we can schedule a call at your earliest convenience to explore options.

cases.description: Standard news article should produce 3-5 bullet points with key entities preserved
cases.output:
* OpenAI will launch GPT-5 in early 2026, its first major model release in over a year, with improved capabilities in coding, mathematical reasoning, and multi-step planning tasks.
* The release is expected to increase competitive pressure on Anthropic and Google, which have recently released their own models, Claude 4 and Gemini 2.5, respectively.
* GPT-5 will be available through both the consumer ChatGPT product and the API, although pricing details have not been disclosed.
* OpenAI has surpassed $5 billion in annual recurring revenue, marking a significant milestone for the company.
* The launch of GPT-5 is expected to further establish OpenAI as a leader in the AI market, with potential implications for the broader tech industry.

cases.description: Business message should be translated to Hindi in Devanagari script
cases.output: हमें यह बताते हुए प्रसन्नता हो रही है कि आपका आवेदन सफल रहा है। कृपया ऑनबोर्डिंग प्रक्रिया शुरू करने के लिए हमारी एचआर टीम से संपर्क करें। टीम में आपका स्वागत है।
